title: Modified Nasal Swab For Detection of Sars-Cov2
author: Joseph Patterson
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfavjie6

steps.title: Transport the cooler and swabbing kit...
steps.instruction: Transport the cooler and swabbing kit to the site for sample processing and place in a 4ºC fridge or coldroom

steps.title: Place the biohazard bag in the...
steps.instruction: Place the biohazard bag in the cooler on top of cooler packs

steps.title: Decontaminate the exterior of the biohazard bag with 70% ethanol
steps.instruction: Decontaminate the exterior of the biohazard bag with 70% ethanol.

steps.title: Place the tubes in biohazard bag
steps.instruction: Place the tubes in biohazard bag.

steps.title: Holding the lid shut, pull straight...
steps.instruction: Holding the lid shut, pull straight on the handle to remove stick through the opening and leave swab pad in tube. Insert plug securely. Discard stick.

steps.title: Remove swab, slide into tube and secure lid
steps.instruction: Remove swab, slide into tube and secure lid.

steps.title: Insert swab gently into your nostril...
steps.instruction: Insert swab gently into your nostril until you meet some resistance. Gently scrub all sides of the nostril and then leave the swab in place for 15 seconds. Repeat in the other nostril

steps.title: Pick up swab the sample collecter has delivered
steps.instruction: Pick up swab the sample collecter has delivered. Remove swab from its sleeve. Open sleeve the whole way and lay the swab on the opened sleeve.

steps.title: Wash your hands with soap and water
steps.instruction: Wash your hands with soap and water.

steps.title: Pick up swabbing kit and transport...
steps.instruction: Pick up swabbing kit and transport to the collection site (kit contains buccal swab, cooler, ice packs, spray bottle with 70% ethanol, biohazard bags, and necessary paperwork).

steps.title: Take the swab out of the...
steps.instruction: Take the swab out of the kit, place it on a clean surface, and back away so the individual self-swabbing can pick up the swab.

steps.title: Establish contact with the individual to...
steps.instruction: Establish contact with the individual to be swabbed and provide instructions.

steps.title: Place the biohazard on a clean surface and back away
steps.instruction: Place the biohazard on a clean surface and back away.

steps.title: Remove PPE before returning to your vehicle
steps.instruction: Remove PPE before returning to your vehicle.
